title: lasianthus obtusus
intro: Lasianthus obtusus, also known as the obtuse lasiandra, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lasianthus obtusus are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
